text.title: XP Extreme Programming Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a team by substrate readiness → flow readiness → craft readiness. Branches name observable practice scores.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: signals for 12 practices, release cadence weekly+, org appetite for adoption?

branch.question: Is substrate avg (tdd + ci + small_releases) ≥ 3 AND done_definition_wired=true?
Is craft avg (pair + collective_ownership + metaphor + planning_game + on_site_customer) ≥ 3?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → substrate avg = (4+5+4)/3 = 4.3 ≥ 3 → flow avg = 3.7 ≥ 3 → craft avg = 2.4 < 3 → verdict=phase-3 (ref r7-phased-adoption).
